name: ASUS ROG Z11 Mini-ITX/DTX Computer Case - 4mm Gray Tempered Glass Panels - Built-in Fan Controller - 2x USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - 2x USB 2.0 - Integrated ARGB LEDs (GR101 ROG Z11 CASE/BLK)
shortName: ASUS ROG Z11 Mini-ITX/DTX Computer Case - 4mm Gray Tempered Glass
description: A compact Mini-ITX/DTX case by ASUS ROG with tempered glass panels and integrated ARGB lighting for small-form-factor builds.

specs.usb_ports: 2x USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A, 1x USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C, 2x USB 2.0
